title: Amarite Greatsword
body:
# Amarite Greatsword

The longsword from amarite is rather large; but what if it was bigger? Introducing Amarite Greatsword! A pack that resizes the base arsenal weapons from clasic 22x22, to an even larger 32x32.

If you happen to find any problems; please send a dm to Lime_void containing the description of the issue, and how it can be replicated.

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
